prompt: Tap turn to refresh blocker-ICM context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. turn is the board anchor, so the tournament read updates on the street where pressure often changes shape.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The turn card is the target board card because that street refreshes whether the blocker is still worth pressing under ICM.
